titleRomaji: Tonari no Seki no Yatsu ga Souiu Me de Mitekuru
titleNative: となりの席のヤツがそういう目で見てくる
synopsis: Being sexy can be mortifying, so who will be the first to tap out in this battle of flirtatious gazes between smitten seatmates Eguchi and Ikezawa? (Source: VIZ Media) Note: Originally self-published, the manga got licensed by Shogakukan and started being publ

title: Kono Inu to Kitara Mago no Koto shika Kangaeteinai: Kensei Maou no Yarinokoshi
titleRomaji: Kono Inu to Kitara Mago no Koto shika Kangaeteinai: Kensei Maou no Yarinokoshi
titleNative: この犬ときたら孫のことしか考えていない～犬生魔王のやり遺し～
synopsis: The "Demonic Invasion" lasted for hundreds of years, and countless heroes were cut down by the Demon Lord during their reign…! Until the hero Terios, known as The Last Hope, finally defeated the Demon Lord and brought peace to the land. But the hero Terios vanished, and the Demon Lord, thought to be dead, is miraculously reborn… as a dog!? This is the story of the last Demon Lord, now all soft and fluffy, desperately trying to live a peaceful life while protecting his granddaughter, now a fugitive targeted by all of creation. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Ring ni Kakero
titleRomaji: Ring ni Kakero
titleNative: リングにかけろ
synopsis: Takane Kiku and Takane Ryuji are the children of a legendary world contender boxer. Kiku, the daughter seems to have inherited her father's boxing sense and tries to teach Ryuji to become a world contender. However, Ryuji hates boxing and gets picked on. After Kiku and Ryuji leave their hometown for Tokyo, Ryuji eventually learns to discover a passion for boxing after an encounter with a boxing prodigy, Kenzaki Jun. This will eventually lead him to learn crazy moves and out of this world opponents to become one of Japan's top junior boxers. (Source: Anime News Network)
synonyms: Put it all in the Ring

title: You Shou Yan
titleRomaji: You Shou Yan
titleNative: 有兽焉
synopsis: In the wake of scientific advancement, the once majestic mythological animals can't be compared to the olden days now. The mythological animal Sibuxiang received orders to descend to the mortal world and to help out other mythological animals in dire straits wandering the human world. In the secular world, he met his old colleague Pixiu in a tight spot, his drinking buddy Tuye down in his luck, and the gold and silver Jue brothers who were demoted to the mortal world... what kind of stories will happen between them? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

title: The Apothecary Is Gonna Make This Ragged Elf Happy
titleRomaji: Boroboro no Elf-san wo Shiawase ni Suru Kusuriuri-san
titleEnglish: The Apothecary Is Gonna Make This Ragged Elf Happy
titleNative: ボロボロのエルフさんを幸せにする薬売りさん
synopsis: An apothecary lives a quiet life selling potions and medicine in a country village, until one day he’s approached with a devil’s bargain. A pawnbroker offers him the perfect ingredient for crafting legendary medicine—but the “ingredient” turns out to be a mortally wounded elf! Legend has it the flesh and bones of elves can be ground up into a true panacea, and this elven maiden is on the brink of death after being ruthlessly tortured by slavers. Filled with rage, the apothecary vows to nurse her back to health and happiness, no matter what it takes. (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Jigoku de Mesu ga Hikaru
titleRomaji: Jigoku de Mesu ga Hikaru
titleNative: 地獄でメスがひかる
synopsis: Hiromi is mistreated by her family because of her naturally ugly appearance. Unable to bear her situation, she attempts to commit suicide, but is rescued in the nick of time by a genius doctor, Iwao Toshiaki, and is exposed to human kindness for the first time. However, Iwao is trying to use Hiromi's brain to enter the realm of the divine, which is inaccessible to humans... (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleRomaji: Amayo no Tsuki
titleNative: 雨夜の月
synopsis: One day, while rushing to a piano lesson, a girl named Saki collides with someone on the street. As Saki collects herself, the stranger picks up the sheet music Saki dropped, hands it to Saki together with a band-aid, and continues on her way—all without sayin

title: Urushi Uruhashi
titleRomaji: Urushi Uruhashi
titleNative: うるしうるはし
synopsis: Mihiro Kanayama is a third-year high school student who aspires to become a lacquerware craftsman. He is given a challenge by his grandfather, who tells him to "create a piece while thinking about the person who would use it." He didn't know how to go about it, until he meets Tsumugi Fukaya, a woman working at an inn. Pure emotions bloom within a young man dedicated to traditional craftsmanship. Though he may be clumsy in his first attempts, you will come to admire his determined perseverance! (Source: Manga Cross, translated)

title: Player
titleRomaji: Player
titleNative: 플레이어
synopsis: Through posting a "Best Comment", I somehow became the main character of a webtoon! (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Shiou no Kikan: Moto Yuusha no Ore, Jibun ga Soshiki Shita Chuuni Himitsu Kessha o Tomeru tame ni Futatabi Isekai ni Shoukan Sareteshimau
titleRomaji: Shiou no Kikan: Moto Yuusha no Ore, Jibun ga Soshiki Shita Chuuni Himitsu Kessha o Tomeru tame ni Futatabi Isekai ni Shoukan Sareteshimau
titleNative: 屍王の帰還　～元勇者の俺、自分が組織した厨二秘密結社を止めるために再び異世界に召喚されてしまう～
synonyms: The Return of the Corpse King
synopsis: "How can my past self get so excited doing all those embarrassing things!?" When he was in the third year of middle school, Hizaki Shiou was summoned to another world to save it. After defeating the Demon King, he was forcibly returned back to the present day. Yet another three years later, he is summoned to the other world once again, this time to stop the rampage of the secret society "Helheim." That organization was supposedly actually the one that he had founded during his chuunibyou phase, where he called himself the "Corpse King"—a dark past too embarrassing to remember! Someone seems to be impersonating the name of "Helheim" and tarnishing its reputation. To uncover the truth behind this mystery and clear the organization's name, the Corpse King reunites with his former subordinates, the "Hakkai," who once made Helheim the strongest it had ever been. While agonizing over his dark past, he begins to take action in the other world once again. Their first stop is the Steel City of Gagiul—rescue the city struggling through famine as well as the pale-looking count's daughter in distress. "Helheim, moving out. (Source: Comic-Walker, translated)

titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleRomaji: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleNative: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記
synonyms: Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
synopsis: Satoshi Oosako is a 40-year-old unemployed man who becomes engrossed in the VR RPG "Sword and Sorcery" after being laid off from his job. In the game, he goes by the name Zeros Merlin and rises to become a top-ranked player. However, he suddenly dies in the middle of a long gaming session. To his surprise, Satoshi wakes up to find himself in a massive unfamiliar forest. He soon learns from the goddess of this world, who brought him here after his death, that he has been reincarnated with all of his in-game stats intact. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: The Jobless Guy Who Has Come to Slay
titleRomaji: Quanmin Zhuanzhi: Wuzhi de Wo Zhong Jie Le Shenming!
titleEnglish: The Jobless Guy Who Has Come to Slay
titleNative: 全民转职：无职的我终结了神明！
synonyms: 無職だが神を滅ぼした
Job Changing for the Entire Population: The Jobless Me Will Terminate the Gods
Tôi – Kẻ vô chức đã diệt thần
I'm A Loser And I Killed The Gods
synopsis: Facing a calamity that left chaos and destruction in its wake, mankind's survival was hanging in the balance. The only solution? Get a job and get good! Some became mages, other summoners. However, Cloud, a promising student with a great future ahead of him refused to get a job! Being jobless is his true calling! (Source: WebComics)

title: The Otome Heroine's Fight for Survival (Manga)
titleRomaji: Otome Game no Heroine de Saikyou Survival @COMIC
titleEnglish: The Otome Heroine's Fight for Survival (Manga)
titleNative: 乙女ゲームのヒロインで最強サバイバル@COMIC
synopsis: After losing her parents at a young age to a monster attack on their village, Alicia is sent to an orphanage, where she spends three miserable years being mistreated—and doing her best to smile through it all. After finally reaching her limit and running away, Alicia is attacked by a strange woman who wants to take the young girl’s place as the protagonist of something called an otome game. During the struggle, Alicia accidentally absorbs part of the woman’s memories and knowledge, transforming her from a scared child to a calculated young woman with a mission: to write her own destiny. Now adrift in an unforgiving world, Alicia vows to grow stronger by any means necessary. She’ll need all the might she can muster if she has any hope of changing her fate and fighting for survival. (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Hatsumi-senpai wa Hoketsu
titleRomaji: Hatsumi-senpai wa Hoketsu
titleNative: 初見先輩は補欠
synopsis: "I wouldn't mind trying it with you, senpai." Hatsumi, a third-year substitute on the baseball team, flinches everytime at the slightly excessive skinship from Hinaki, a second-year regular. One day, however, Hatsumi witnesses Hinaki kissing another member of the club and begins to feel unsettled. A sensitive BL between a senior who is always an substitute and a junior who is a regular. (Source: East Press, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Saikyou Shoukanshi wa Arasa Ossan: Card wo Oya ni Shobun sareta Card Gamer no Isekai Musou
titleRomaji: Saikyou Shoukanshi wa Arasa Ossan: Card wo Oya ni Shobun sareta Card Gamer no Isekai Musou
titleNative: 最強召喚士はアラサーおっさん 〜カードを親に処分されたカードゲーマーの異世界無双〜
synopsis: The story follows Sousaku Kamifuda, an otaku around his 30s, who is fully indulging in his trading card game hobby. In the midst of his mother selling the entirety of his precious card collection, the man is transported to another world. Using his card game skills, he attempts to find a way back home. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Over Rev!
titleRomaji: Over Rev!
titleNative: オーバーレブ!
synonyms: A Legend of Ultimate Hot Rodder
synopsis: Ryoko's life used to revolve around track but due to an injury she can no longer follow the path she hoped to. One day while out with her friends, she witnesses two cars racing and gets caught up in the excitement, especially after realizing the one driver is a young woman like herself! When a chance arrives for her to try drifting, she dives right in, even though she's never driven a car before. Suddenly, she has a new passion... and a lot to learn. (Source: Shogakukan, translated)
